info.title: bravectl
info.description:
A lightweight C# command-line tool that interacts with the Brave
API to facilitate web searches from your CLI.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Result filter. Possible options are videos, web.

options.name: --country
options.description:
(Optional: E.g US) Search query country, where the results
come from.

options.name: --interface
options.description:
(Optional: E.g en-US) User interface language perferred in
response.

options.name: --safe
options.description:
(Optional: E.g off) Filter search results for adult
content. Possible options are off, moderate, strict.

options.name: --max
options.description:
(Optional: E.g 10) Number of returned result. Default
count is 5 and max is 20
